# StockEX
> AI-powered stock research and analysis platform for Indian equities.

## Key links
- [StockEX Homepage](https://stockstory-india.com/)
- [Stock Scanner](https://stockstory-india.com/scanner)
- [Market Reports](https://stockstory-india.com/reports)
- [Portfolio](https://stockstory-india.com/portfolio)
- [Stock Analysis](https://stockstory-india.com/stocks/)

## About
StockEX provides AI-powered fundamental research, technical analysis, and market insights for Indian stock market investors.
